description.dutch: Verzamel alle trofeeën.
description.english: Get all trophies
description.greek: Απόκτησε όλα τα τρόπαια.
description.italian: Ottieni tutti i trofei.
description.spanish: Consigue todos los trofeos.

description.danish: Udslet den truende fare og forsvar Jorden!
description.dutch: Vernietig de dreigende bedreiging en verdedig de Aarde!
description.english: Annihilate the looming threat and defend Earth!
description.french: Anéantis la menace et défends la Terre.
description.german: Eliminiere die herannahende Bedrohung und schütze den Planeten!
description.greek: Εξόντωσε την απειλή που πλησιάζει και υπεράσπισε τη Γη!
description.italian: Annienta la minaccia e difendi la Terra.
description.portuguese: Aniquila a ameaça e defende a Terra.
description.russian: Уничтожь нависающую угрозу и защити Землю!
description.spanish: Aniquila la amenaza y defiende la Tierra.
description.turkish: Tehdidi yok et ve Dünya’yı savun.

description.dutch: Upgrade je schip drie keer.
description.english: Upgrade your ship three times.
description.greek: Αναβάθμισε το σκάφος σου τρεις φορές.
description.italian: Potenzia la tua nave tre volte.
description.portuguese: Melhora a tua nave três vezes.
description.spanish: Mejora tu nave tres veces.

description.danish: Ødelæg 80% af asteroiderne i alle bølger.
description.dutch: Vernietig 80% van de asteroïden in alle golven.
description.english: Destroy 80% of the asteroids in all waves.
description.greek: Κατάστρεψε το 80% των αστεροειδών σε όλα τα κύματα.
description.italian: Distruggi l’80% di tutti gli asteroidi.
description.spanish: Destruye el 80% de todos los asteroides.

description.dutch: Vernietig 75% van de asteroïden in alle golven.

description.greek: Κατάστρεψε το 75% των αστεροειδών σε όλα τα κύματα.
description.italian: Distruggi il 75% di tutti gli asteroidi.
description.spanish: Destruye el 75% de todos los asteroides.

description.danish: Opgrader dit kølesystem for at øge skudhastigheden.
description.dutch: Upgrade je koelsysteem om de vuursnelheid te verhogen.
description.english: Upgrade your cooling system to increase firing rate.
description.french: Améliore ton système de refroidissement pour tirer plus vite.
description.german: Verbessere dein Kühlsystem und steigere deine Schussfrequenz
description.greek: Αναβάθμισε το σύστημα ψύξης για να αυξήσεις τον ρυθμό πυρός.
description.italian: Potenzia il sistema di raffreddamento per aumentare la velocità di fuoco.
description.polish: Ulepsz system chłodzenia, aby zwiększyć szybkostrzelność.
description.portuguese: Melhora o sistema de arrefecimento para aumentar a cadência de tiro.
description.russian: Улучшите систему охлаждения, чтобы увеличить скорость стрельбы.
description.spanish: Mejora tu sistema de refrigeración para aumentar la cadencia de tiro.
description.turkish: Ateş hızını artırmak için soğutma sistemini yükselt.

description.danish: Optimer energiforbruget for at øge laseroutput.
description.dutch: Optimaliseer energiegebruik om je laseroutput te verhogen.
description.english: Optimize power usage to boost laser output.
description.french: Optimise l’énergie pour booster tes lasers.
description.german: Reduziere den Energieverbrauch und verstärke deine Laser.
description.greek: Βελτιστοποίησε τη χρήση ενέργειας για να ενισχύσεις την απόδοση του λέιζερ.
description.italian: Ottimizza l’uso dell’energia per potenziare i laser.
description.portuguese: Otimiza a energia para potenciar os lasers.
description.russian: Оптимизируй использование энергии для усиления мощности лазера.
description.spanish: Optimiza el uso de energía para potenciar los láseres.
description.turkish: Laseri güçlendirmek için enerji kullanımını optimize et.

description.dutch: Installeer een tweede laserkanon.
description.english: Install a second laser cannon.
description.greek: Εγκατάστησε ένα δεύτερο κανόνι λέιζερ.
description.italian: Installa un secondo cannone laser.
description.spanish: Instala un segundo cañón láser.

description.dutch: Houd 60 seconden onafgebroken vuur vol.
description.english: Maintain uninterrupted fire for 60 seconds.
description.german: Halte ununterbrochenes Feuer für 60 Sekunden aufrecht.
description.greek: Διατήρησε αδιάκοπο πυρ για 60 δευτερόλεπτα.
description.italian: Spara senza interruzioni per 60 secondi.
description.portuguese: Mantém o fogo contínuo durante 60 segundos.
description.spanish: Mantén el fuego ininterrumpido durante 60 segundos.

description.dutch: Verzamel alle drie power-ups.
description.english: Collect all three power-ups.
description.greek: Συγκέντρωσε και τα τρία power-ups.
description.italian: Raccogli tutti e tre i potenziamenti.
description.spanish: Recoge las tres mejoras.

displayName.spanish: La última defensa de la Tierra

description.dutch: Bereid je voor op de verdediging van de Aarde.
description.english: Prepare for Earth's Defense.
description.german: Mach dich bereit, die Erde zu verteidigen.
description.greek: Ετοιμάσου για την υπεράσπιση της Γης.
description.italian: Preparati a difendere la Terra.
description.spanish: Prepárate para la defensa de la Tierra.

description.dutch: Accepteer de missie en red de Aarde.
description.english: Accept the Mission and save the Earth.
description.french: Accepte la mission et sauve la Terre.
description.german: Nimm die Herausforderung an und rette die Erde.
description.greek: Αποδέξου την αποστολή και σώσε τη Γη.
description.italian: Accetta la missione e salva la Terra.
description.portuguese: Aceita a missão e salva a Terra.
description.spanish: Acepta la misión y salva la Tierra.
description.turkish: Görevi kabul et ve Dünya’yı kurtar.

description.danish: Afvis missionen og overlad Jorden til sin skæbne.
description.dutch: Weiger de missie en laat de Aarde aan haar lot over.
description.english: Refuse the mission and leave Earth to its fate.
description.french: Refuse la mission et laisse la Terre à son sort.
description.german: Lehne die Mission ab und überlasse die Erde ihrem Schicksal.
description.greek: Αρνήσου την αποστολή και άφησε τη Γη στη μοίρα της.
description.italian: Rifiuta la missione e lascia la Terra al suo destino.
description.polish: Odrzuć misję i zostaw Ziemię jej losowi.
description.portuguese: Recusa a missão e deixa a Terra ao seu destino.
description.russian: Откажись от миссии и оставь Землю её судьбе.
description.spanish: Rechaza la misión y deja la Tierra a su suerte.
description.turkish: Görevi reddet ve Dünya’yı kaderine terk et.

displayName.danish: Tak for din indsats indtil nu
displayName.dutch: Bedankt voor je inzet tot nu toe
displayName.english: Thank you for your efforts so far
displayName.italian: Grazie per il tuo impegno finora
displayName.portuguese: Obrigado pelo teu esforço até agora
displayName.spanish: Gracias por tu esfuerzo hasta ahora

description.danish: Forlad spillet og tag en pause.
description.dutch: Verlaat het spel en neem een pauze.
description.english: Exit the game and take a break.
description.french: Quitte le jeu et fais une pause.
description.german: Mach eine Pause und beende das Spiel.
description.greek: Βγες από το παιχνίδι και κάνε ένα διάλειμμα.
description.italian: Esci dal gioco e prenditi una pausa.
description.polish: Wyjdź z gry i zrób sobie przerwę.
description.portuguese: Sai do jogo e faz uma pausa.
description.russian: Выйди из игры и сделай перерыв.
description.spanish: Sal del juego y tómate un descanso.
description.turkish: Çıkış yap ve biraz ara ver.

description.danish: Se de afsluttende credits og vis ære for skaberne.
description.dutch: Bekijk de eindcredits en eer de makers.
description.english: Watch the finalend credits and honor the makers.
description.french: Regardez le générique final et rendez hommage aux créateurs.
description.german: Schau dir den finalen Abspann an und würdige die Macher.
description.greek: Παρακολούθησε τους τελικούς τίτλους και τίμησε τους δημιουργούς.
description.italian: Guarda i titoli di coda finali e rendi omaggio ai creatori.
description.polish: Obejrzyj końcowe napisy i oddaj hołd twórcom.
description.portuguese: Assista aos créditos finais e preste homenagem aos criadores.
description.russian: Посмотри финальные титры и отдай должное создателям.
description.spanish: Mira los créditos finales y rinde homenaje a los creadores.
description.turkish: Final jeneriğini izle ve yapımcılara saygını göster.

description.danish: Invester i Science og forbedr dit skib.
description.dutch: Investeer Science en verbeter je schip.
description.english: Invest Science and improve your ship.
description.french: Investis dans la Science et améliore ton vaisseau.
description.greek: Επένδυσε στο Science και βελτίωσε το σκάφος σου.
description.italian: Investi nella Scienza e migliora la tua nave.
description.polish: Zainwestuj w Naukę i ulepsz swój statek.
description.portuguese: Investe em Ciência e melhora a tua nave.
description.russian: Инвестируй в Science и улучши свой корабль.
description.spanish: Invierte Ciencia y mejora tu nave.
description.turkish: Bilime yatırım yap ve gemini geliştir.

description.danish: Genstart ti gange efter hver ødelæggelse.
description.dutch: Start tien keer opnieuw na elke vernietiging.
description.english: Restart ten times after each destruction.
description.french: Redémarre dix fois après chaque destruction.
description.german: Starte zehnmal nach jeder Zerstörung neu.
description.greek: Ξεκίνα ξανά δέκα φορές μετά από κάθε καταστροφή.
description.italian: Riparti dieci volte dopo ogni distruzione.
description.polish: Uruchom ponownie dziesięć razy po każdej destrukcji.
description.portuguese: Reinicia dez vezes após cada destruição.
description.russian: Перезапусти десять раз после каждого уничтожения.
description.spanish: Reinicia diez veces tras cada destrucción.
description.turkish: Her yok oluştan sonra on kez yeniden başla.

description.danish: Slå alle bølger tilbage og genstart spillet.
description.dutch: Sla alle golven terug en start het spel opnieuw.
description.english: Fight back all waves and restart the game.
description.french: Repousse toutes les vagues et redémarre le jeu.
description.german: Schlage alle Wellen zurück und starte das Spiel neu.
description.greek: Απόκρουσε όλα τα κύματα και ξεκίνα ξανά το παιχνίδι.
description.italian: Respingi tutte le ondate e riavvia il gioco.
description.polish: Odeprzyj wszystkie fale i uruchom grę ponownie.
description.portuguese: Repele todas as ondas e reinicia o jogo.
description.russian: Отрази все волны и начни игру заново.
description.spanish: Rechaza todas las oleadas y reinicia el juego.
description.turkish: Tüm dalgaları geri püskürt ve oyunu yeniden başlat.

description.danish: Ødelæg alle asteroider i en bølge.
description.dutch: Vernietig alle asteroïden van een willekeurige golf.
description.english: Destroy all Asteroids of any wave.
description.french: Détruis tous les astéroïdes d'une vague quelconque.
description.german: Zerstöre alle Asteroiden einer beliebigen Welle.
description.greek: Κατάστρεψε όλους τους αστεροειδείς ενός κύματος.
description.italian: Distruggi tutti gli asteroidi di qualsiasi ondata.
description.polish: Zniszcz wszystkie asteroidy z dowolnej fali.
description.portuguese: Destrói todos os asteroides de qualquer onda.
description.russian: Уничтожь все астероиды в любой волне.
description.spanish: Destruye todos los asteroides de cualquier oleada.
description.turkish: Herhangi bir dalgadaki tüm asteroidleri yok et.

description.dutch: Versla baas #4 zonder upgrades.
description.english: Defeat Boss #4 without any upgrades.
description.french: Vaincre le boss n° 4 sans aucune amélioration.
description.greek: Νίκησε το Αφεντικό #4 χωρίς καμία αναβάθμιση.
description.italian: Sconfiggi il boss n.° 4 senza alcun potenziamento.
description.portuguese: Derrote o chefe n.º 4 sem nenhuma melhoria.
description.spanish: Derrota al jefe n.º 4 sin mejoras.

description.danish: Besejr boss #7 med kun én opgradering.
description.dutch: Versla baas #7 met slechts één upgrade.
description.english: Defeat Boss #7 with only one upgrade.
description.french: Vaincre le boss n° 7 avec une seule amélioration.
description.german: Besiege Boss Nr. 7 mit nur einem Upgrade.
description.greek: Νίκησε το Αφεντικό #7 με μόνο μία αναβάθμιση.
description.italian: Sconfiggi il boss n.° 7 con un solo potenziamento.
description.polish: Pokonaj Bossa nr 7 z tylko jednym ulepszeniem.
description.portuguese: Derrote o chefe n.º 7 com apenas uma melhoria.
description.russian: Победи босса № 7 только с одним улучшением.
description.spanish: Derrota al jefe n.º 7 con solo una mejora.
description.turkish: Sadece bir yükseltme ile #7 numaralı Boss’u yen.
